_doc: Source registry. Weights are intentionally close to equal, mirroring FantasyPros ECR / DLF consensus practice (analyst rankings averaged). KTC + FC get a small market-signal premium because they're crowdsourced rather than single-analyst. IDP_Show is heavily deweighted because Phoenix League scores IDP at half points, AND their list mixes 2026 NFL Draft picks with 2026-college-stayer projections (2027 prospects).

fc.label: FantasyCalc SF dynasty (no TEP)
fc._note: Algorithmic market. Slight premium, smaller because no TEP.

cbs_mock.label: CBS Sports SF TEP rookie-only mock (8 expert)

idp_show.label: The IDP Show SF/TEP/IDP mock (low weight: half-pt IDP)
idp_show._note: Heavily deweighted. Phoenix League IDP is half-points so IDP rookies aren't worth as much as offensive rookies. List also includes college stayers (2027 prospects) which aren't draftable now.

sleeper_adp.label: Sleeper post-draft mock ADP (live, your league)
sleeper_adp._note: Run sleeper_scraper.py once your league draft starts (May 4).
